title: 建立客户—代表关系 / Client–Representative Relationships
summary: 关系建立在信任、清晰沟通与明确期望;开场厘清服务范围、收费与责任,并提供持续服务。 / Relationships rest on trust, clear communication and managed expectations; clarify scope, fees and responsibilities up front, and provide ongoing service.

sections.heading: 建立信任与范围
sections.body: 以诚信、专业、保密赢得信任;一开始厘清服务范围、收费、双方责任,管理期望避免误解。

sections.heading: Trust & scope
sections.body: Earn trust through integrity, competence and confidentiality; clarify scope, fees and responsibilities up front to manage expectations.

sections.heading: 持续关系
sections.body: 关系含售后持续服务(检视、答疑、调整),非仅一次销售。

sections.heading: Ongoing relationship
sections.body: The relationship includes ongoing service (reviews, queries, adjustments), not just one sale.

keyPoints: 信任 + 清晰沟通 / Trust + clear communication
开场厘清 scope/收费/责任 / Clarify scope/fees/responsibilities up front
提供持续服务 / Provide ongoing service
